case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. HENRY TOTAH et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAH, HENRY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOTAH, HENRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 241 SIXTH STREET, #208A, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAH, HENRY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED SEP-10-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAH, HENRY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TOTAH, HENRY
DECLARATION RE: AUNTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
